title: Dark Factory Specification
description: Formal schema for specifications passed from intent-engineering to dark-factory

specification_id.description: Unique identifier for this specification, format: spec-XXXXXXXX

title.description: Human-readable name of the feature or skill being built

description.description: Clear description of what should be built and why

version.description: Semantic version of this specification, e.g. 1.0.0

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this specification was created

behavioral_scenarios.description: List of behavioral scenarios defining what the software should do

expected_output.description: Expected output data for this scenario

tags.description: Optional tags for grouping scenarios (e.g. happy-path, edge-case)

test_pass_rate.description: Minimum required pass rate for behavioral tests (recommended: 0.95)

max_execution_time_ms.description: Maximum allowed execution time in milliseconds

dependencies.description: List of skill or system names this specification depends on

guards.description: Security guards to enforce during execution

ecosystem_dependencies.description: Other skills in the ecosystem this specification interacts with
